Name: Custom Crystal Awards
Description:
Custom Crystal Awards are a great way to recognize the top stars in your organization. TrophyPartner.com offers custom crystal trophies and awards for all occasions: sales achievement, years of service, retirement, rising star awards, rookie of the year trophies, crystal gifts, and high quality sports trophies.   We offer more imprinting processes than anyone in the industry including: deep etch, colorfill, 3D subsurface,  and IlIllumachrome to make your awards really stand out.

Can't decide on an award.  Let us do the work for you. Email us with the following information:

1) Budget per piece or budget range
2) Number of pieces needed
3) Date needed
4) Award Occasion: sales achievement, retirement, service awards, etc.
5) Required colors or designs elements
6) Size requirements ((height and width)
7) Your logo in a high resolution vector art format (.eps or .ai)

We will put together 2-3 concepts that are within your price range and email those to you.  Chose from one of the designs or tweak it until we've put together the perfect award for you.

Please check out some of our beautiful crystal awards from our video below and explore all of the different ways we have to imprint your award to make it a truly special piece for your recipient.

Custom Crystal Trophies & Awards

TrophyPartner.com is your source for custom awards.  We make custom trophies, custom medals and dog tags, custom 3-D crystal trophies, custom award belts, custom plaques, and much more.

We provide free design work on many of our custom awards.  Simply email us your logo along with some basic information about your project and let one of our artists go to work.  Within 2-3 business days we will provide 2-3 concepts for you to review.  Tweak the designs until we have created the perfect award for you.

Our custom acrylic trophies are our most popular custom award option and are based on your logo or design.  We can design for any budget, size, or shape. The possibilities are endless.  Visit our custom acrylic trophies page to view the different options we offer, expected pricing, and pictures of trophies we have created for other customers.

What do our customers think about our custom awards?  Bill Sherer said "I wanted to let you know that the awards arrived yesterday and I was able to finally look at them last night. You out did yourself, they are incredible! I cannot wait to send them out to our regional winners. Not only are they head turning awards, but they will no doubt become sought after and go a long way in boosting the competitive spirit among our national ranks. Thank you for your patience in working through this with me. Don't lose that design as you've more than earned our repeat business!"

Request for free custom award design by filling out our custom design request form on our custom awards page or email us with the following information:
1) Provide desired design group
2) Provide budget per piece or budget range
3) Provide number of pieces needed
4) Provide date needed
5) Provide required colors or design elements
6) Provide size requirements (height/width)
7) Provide a sketch, logo, or description of what you want

Description:
Create your own custom acrylic awards and lucite trophies based on your logo in any size, shape and budget.  Our custom acrylic trophies are built around your logo and are perfect for corporate recognition programs, service awards, or to mark a special event. The possibilities are endless.  View our custom awards inspiration gallery for more ideas on how to create your perfect recognition award.

We provide free design work.  Simply email us your logo along with some basic information and let one of our artists go to work.  Within 2-3 business days we will provide 2-3 concepts for you to review.  Tweak the designs until we have created the perfect trophy for you. 

Our process usually takes 3-4 weeks to complete: one week for design, two weeks for production, and one week for shipping.  If you are in a hurry, we still may be able to help.  Let us know.

Not sure you can afford something custom?  Most likely you can.  Check out our custom acrylic awards pricing guidelines sheet below to see how much a typical design will cost or email us your budget and we will let you know what we can make within your price range.  A $400 minimum purchase is required. We offer award belts in three different sizes: large with four areas of customization, a smaller belt with three areas of customization, or a kids award belt perfect for smaller sizes.  Each custom belt is made of quality heavyweight metal plates combined with expertly tooled leather and jewelry quality plating and makes one big bad unforgettable award for a Big Winner.

Name: Custom 3D Crystal Awards
Description:
Our Custom 3D Subsurface Crystal Awards feature our innovative 3D Subsurface Laser Engraving process but can also be done in 2D.  Each crystal gift and award is laser engraved "inside" the crystal using our state-of-the-art lasers.  Any image can be recreated in the middle of flawless optical crystal.  A landmark, company logo, or even a human face can be recreated in three-dimensional space.  To make these awards even more unique, we can add color.

Adding 3D subsurface engraving to optical crystal creates vivid detail of any logo or image inside your gift or award, bringing the award to life.  No logo is too big, too small, or too intricate for this imprint process allowing you to a create a "wow" effect when the award is presented to its recipient.

Create your own custom 3D Trophy




We offer free 2D artwork service and 3D artwork service starts at $60 per hour if you are unable to provide one of the specific files listed below. 

3D Subsurface Laser Engraving Art Specifications
•    Formats accepted: 3D Studio Max, .DWG, .3DS, .OBJ, .IGS, and .STL
•    Minimum resolution for JPEG images is 300dpi - provide front, back, left, right, top, and bottom views, if possible

2D Laser Engraving Art Specifications
•    Vector art is required
•    Art must be black and white only
•    Formats accepted: .AI, .EPS, .PDF
•    Minimum resolution is 300 dpi
•    We will also accept .JPG, .GIF, .TIFF, and .BMP; art charges may apply

Request for free custom trophy design by filling out our custom design request form on our custom awards page or email us with the following information:
1) Provide budget per piece or budget range
2) Provide number of pieces needed
3) Provide date needed
4) Provide required colors or design elements
5) Provide size requirements (height/width)
6) Provide your logo in a high resolution format (.eps or .ai) and a sketch or description of what you want
SETitle: Custom 3D Crystal Awards |  Laser Etched 3D Engraving |  TrophyPartner.com
SEDescription: Custom 3D Subsurface Crystal Awards include optical crystal awards with three-dimensional designs floating inside. Any image can be re-created in the middle of flawless optical crystal: a landmark, a company logo, even a human face can be re-created. Your imagination is our only limitation.

Description:
Champion rings have been a symbol of excellence in professional sports since the first World Series ring was presented in 1922.  We offer Champion, Finalist, Fantasy, and plain bezel rings in a variety of sports and activities and custom rings for business organizations and teams.

Our rings are heavy weight "QUALICAST" metal rings and are available in 7 sizes in either antique gold or antique silver finishes.  We have 5 bezel styles, 15 stock inserts, and 8 synthetic stone colors available to choose from  We can also add your logo, company or special event image to any of our rings with a VIBRAPRINT poly domed or new Texture-Tone insert.

Our championship rings are perfect for football, baseball, basketball, softball, boxing, wrestling, UFC, MMA, martial arts, fantasy football, extreme sports, top sales, corporate recognition programs, team building, golf, bowling, swimming, cheer, dance, and gymnastics.  

With TrophyPartner.com you are sure to be King of the Rings.  These champion rings are a wonderful functional alternative to traditional awards.  It's an award you can wear everyday.

Name: Custom Award Belts
Description:
Champion Belts are large, extravagantly designed belts that have been the coveted award for professional boxers, mixed martial arts and professional wrestlers for decades to signify the champions of their sports, but have remained unobtainable as a realistic award until recently with the advent of custom champion award belts.

Now these belts are becoming mainstream and used for fantasy football, cooking competitions, eating contests, extreme sports, BMX, skateboarding, surfing, top sales, corporate recognition and team building, snowboarding, motocross, car shows, golf, bowling, swimming, cheer, dance, gymnastics, battle of the bands, birthdays, holidays, and even retirement.

Much like a cup or trophy in other sports, champion belts are taking off as an alternative and can now be purchased at an affordable price.  With the ability to design a belt from scratch these belts are becoming even more popular. Championship belts feature quality heavyweight metal plates combined with expertly tooled leather and jewelry quality plating and finishing equal one big bad unforgettable award for the Big Winner in your life.  These belts can weigh up to 7 pounds and we assure you will be blown away when you receive it because this award can last a lifetime and spark proud conversation and smiles. 

TrophyPartner.com delivers belts that can be completely customized and delivered to your doorstep in as little as 5 business days.  Each belt is elegantly packaged.

Description:
Let’s not forget those who are on the front lines during these difficult times. Offer a sincere thank you to the first responders, medical and healthcare providers, and long term caregivers who go above and beyond to help all of us. Show your gratitude to the lifesavers who are working unbelievably hard to get us all through this global health situation.

When a simple “thank you” won’t suffice, our collection of medical challenge coins and caregiving champ chains are ideal tokens of appreciation. Present these mementos to hospital staff, doctors, nurses, police, firefighters, paramedics, emt personnel, and medical technicians who are saving lives - maybe even yours - while risking their own.

Browse our gifts of gratitude for the healthcare workers and first responders, and show your appreciation for the kindness and compassion they provide every day. These simple but poignant tokens will give them the recognition they deserve.
